cases.title: ADMM citation in SCI decoding
cases.prompt: In the Related Work section, the authors say many optimization-based SCI methods employ ADMM. Which reference do they cite for ADMM, and where is that stated exactly? Provide the exact supporting sentence.

cases.title: Implementation details: iterations and batch size (rays)
cases.prompt: In the Implementation details paragraph (Experiments section), how many iterations do they train for, and what is the batch size measured in rays? Point me to the exact supporting sentence(s) and make sure the jump target is correct.

cases.title: Figure 3 experimental setup caption
cases.prompt: For Figure 3, which key components are listed in the experimental setup caption? Point me to the exact supporting caption sentence.

anchor_contains_any: Experimental setup for real dataset collection
